Drivers License Chords

by Olivia Rodrigo
4,799,239 views154,086 saves93 comments
Author: megemoo12345 [pro] 152Difficulty: Intermediate
Full version of the song https://youtu.be/aEoqpl9t94g.
0.2
Tr. 0
Tuning: E A D G B EKey: BbCapo: 
[Verse 1]
G
  I got my driver’s license last week
                            Em
Just like we always talked about
 
'Cause you were so excited for me
                            C
To finally drive up to your house
 
But today I drove through the suburbs
                           G
Crying 'cause you weren't around
 
[Verse 2]
G
  And you're probably with that blonde girl
 
Who always made me doubt
Em
  She's so much older than me
 
She's everything I'm insecure about
        C
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
                                    G
'Cause how could I ever love someone else?
 
[Chorus]
e|---------------------------|
B|---0---0-----0-1---0---0---|
G|-0---2---0-2-----0---2-----|
D|--2-2-2-2-2-2-2-2-0-0-0-0--|(2x)
A|---------------------------|
E|---------------------------|
 
    C
And I know we weren't perfect
                                 G
but I've never felt this way for no one
    C
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay
         G
now that I'm gone
 
      Em         D             G             Bm7    C
Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
       C6                    D                   G
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
 
[Verse 3]
G
  And all my friends are tired
 
of hearing how much I miss you, but
Em
   I kinda feel sorry for them
 
'Cause they'll never know you the way that I do, yeah
  C
Today I drove through the suburbs
                               G
and pictured I was driving home to you
 
[Chorus]
e|---------------------------|
B|---0---0-----0-1---0---0---|
G|-0---2---0-2-----0---2-----|
D|--2-2-2-2-2-2-2-2-0-0-0-0--|(2x)
A|---------------------------|
E|---------------------------|
 
    C
And I know we weren't perfect
                                 G
but I've never felt this way for no one, ooh
    C
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay
         G
now that I'm gone
 
        Em         D             G             Bm7    C
I guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
       C6                    D                  G            G D/F#
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
 
[Bridge]
Em
Red lights, stop signs
C                            G
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
D                              Em
Can't drive past the places we used to go to
       C                          G
'Cause I still fuckin' love you, babe
     D
Oooooooooh
 
Em
Sidewalks we crossed
C                              G
I still hear your voice in the traffic, we're laughing
D
over all the noise
        Em
God I'm so blue, know we're through
    C                          G
But I still fuckin' love you, babe
     D
Oooooooooh
 
[Chorus]
e|---------------------|
B|-------0--1----------|
G|-0--2--------0--2-4--|
D|-2--2--2--2--0-------|(2x)
A|---------------------|
E|---------------------|
 
C
I know we weren't perfect
                                 G
but I've never felt this way for no one
    C
And I just can't imagine how you could be so okay
         G
now that I'm gone
      Em         D             Bm7           D      C
Guess you didn't mean what you wrote in that song about me
       C6                    D                  G
'Cause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
 
[Outro]
      C                     D                  Em7
Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

93 comments

ezperricone1 209Jan 8, 2021
Hey. I just made a correction suggesting that the 7th chords imply the C# in with the D# chord which doesn't happen, BUT when Liv sings "I know we weren't perfect", there is a D which means it could be D#M7 if you wanted to get fancy. Just a heads up :)
80
larabedevian [a] 20Jan 10, 2021
olivia is so talented!! her pain and emotion in this song is projected so much and it’s very raw. i can feel her sadness and i really hope she stays strong through whatever she’s going through
45
soniti37 [a] 10Jan 8, 2021
this is perfect thank you!
